description: CompositionGrey, brown and red printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a scooped round neck with a high back, yoke with lace and gold stitch detailing, short sleeves with lace around the cuffs, brown tape detailing and lace at the hem, and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cuts. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
